mapper.select:
select level_id as levelId, level_code as levelCode, level_name as levelName, level_no as levelNo, growth_threshold as growthThreshold, icon, applicable_role as applicableRole from jst_level_config where status = 1 and del_flag = '0'
and applicable_role in (#{role}, 'both')
order by level_no asc, level_id asc
